description: Error-handling engine lifecycle hooks. Cross-platform, prompt-first.

hooks.prompt:
DOMAIN: error-handling
IF task involves: debugging, error diagnosis, exception design, resilience, circuit breakers, or recovery patterns
THEN: Read ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/SKILL.md before responding.
RATIONALE: Training data error patterns may be stale. Doctrine is truth.
IF_SKIP: Risk outdated debugging guidance.

VERIFY: If this session involved error diagnosis or debugging, did the response consult ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/references/ ?
IF_NO: Continue and check references/debugging-protocol.md first.
